allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; sites=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(s[''''id''''], s[''''name''''], s.get\(''''url'''',''''''''\)\) for s in sites]")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; r=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''''Build ID:'''', r.get\(''''id''''\)\); print\(''''State:'''', r.get\(''''state''''\)\); print\(''''Deploy ID:'''', r.get\(''''deploy_id'''',''''''''\)\)")
